audit_items.proof_trace: The defect is confirmed: `free(list)` is missing before the two early `return 1` paths at lines 4647 (invalid IPv6) and 4665 (invalid port). However, stress-testing reveals that both callers (lines 5746 and 5761) unconditionally call `exit(EX_OSERR)` when `server_sockets` returns non-zero, so the process terminates immediately after the leak — the OS reclaims all memory. Furthermore, `settings.inter` is set via the `-l` startup flag (local configuration), so this path is not reachable from external network input.
